title: leymus humilis
intro: Leymus humilis, also known as Blue Lyme Grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a demulcent and anti-inflammatory agent, to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Leymus humilis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. Leymus humilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
